nsNativeComponentLoader:
GetFactory(/usr/local/lib/linux-netscape6/components/libwidget_gtk.so) Load
FAILED with error: /lib/libc.so.6: version GLIBC_2.1.3' not found (required
by /usr/lib/libgtk-1.2.so.0)

I have deinstalled and reinstalled all the linux dependencies.

How-To-Repeat: make
make install
netscape6
